Gamer (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,534,907Details
International Box Office $21,467,122
Worldwide Box Office $42,002,029
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,882,622
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,063,369
Total $16,945,991
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,156,057 (44.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.24 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,502 opening theaters/2,502 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,746,336

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 4th, 2009 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: January 19th, 2010 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for frenetic dequences of strong brutal violence throughout, sexual content, nudity and language
Running Time: 95 minutes
Plot point: Framed, Mind Control, Prison, Video Game, Video Game Industry
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lakeshore Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
